evidence_direction_note: NON_CONTRIBUTORY 2026-04-11 governance. Measurement infrastructure failure: n_cosine_samples=0 in both RESOURCE_SEED and WORLD_SEED conditions across all 5 seeds. The cosine similarity measurement between z_goal and z_resource was never computed -- the eval loop never found conditions where both were populated simultaneously, or the measurement path never fired. goal_resource_r is undefined (no samples). Conditions are indistinguishable because no signal was captured. Needs /diagnose-errors to identify why n_cosine_samples=0. Does not weaken SD-015 or MECH-112.
